claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: A native div scrollport with browser-owned overflow, scrollbar, wheel, touch, and keyboard behavior.
semantics.focusPolicy: The root is not focusable by default. focusable=true creates tabIndex=0 and requires aria-label or aria-labelledby in the TypeScript API; false removes all naming, region, and tab-stop output.
semantics.rolePolicy: The inert default adds no role. Explicit focusable=true adds role=region with its required name because the independently meaningful scrollport is then a deliberate landmark and keyboard stop.
semantics.overscrollPolicy: containOverscroll is independent from focusability; false restores native scroll chaining without changing semantics.

keyboard.behavior: Enters the root only when focusable=true; otherwise reaches focusable descendants in DOM order.

keyboard.key: Arrow keys, Page Up/Down, Home/End, Space
keyboard.behavior: Browser-native scrolling when the scrollport owns focus; Mergora does not intercept the event.

pointerTouch: Native scrollbars, wheel/trackpad, touch panning, momentum, and pointer cancellation remain browser-owned. No custom drag surface replaces them.

layout.overflow: Native overflow:auto is retained and scrollbars remain visibly styled without hiding the platform affordance.
layout.safeArea: viewport size subtracts physical block-edge safe-area insets; scroll padding is logical.
layout.direction: Native inline scrolling and logical scroll padding follow the inherited ltr/rtl direction.

consumerResponsibilities: Use focusable=true only when the overflow region is independently meaningful and provide a concise localized name.
Keep focusable descendants in logical DOM order and ensure custom content does not suppress the native scrollbar or focus outline.
Document essential two-dimensional scrolling and provide a non-panning alternative when the relationship is not inherently two-dimensional.
Revalidate contrast and scrollbar visibility after overriding component tokens or CSS.
